chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 323 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.1495/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.1496/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 11.03.2025 Mr. Muhammad Qayyum Arain, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< 1. Urgency granted. 3to4 Through this petition, the petitioner is seeking directions to Respondents (Revenue Officials) to change the foti khata of land, nomenclature of which, mentioned in the para-2 of memo of the petition in the name of the mother of petitioner. Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG present in Court in connection with some other matters, waives notice and submits that recently, the Senior Member Board of Revenue, Sindh, through Notification No.DD(E&I)-HQ/BOR/2024/302, dated 21.10.2024 has established a “Public Grievance Redressal Cell” under the aegis of the concerned Deputy Commissioner across Sindh. This Cell is mandated to address public grievances pertaining to revenue matters, including mutation entries, sale certificates, foti-khata-badal, demarcation of land, land partition, and solvency certificates. The establishment of this Cell provides an alternate, effective, and exhaustive remedy for redressal of complaints related to revenue issues. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of along with listed application, leaving it open for the petitioner to avail the remedy delineated by the “Public Grievances Redressal Cell” as prescribed by the Notification. Judge Judge ARBROHI
